Common.tagline: Predict. Play. Rise to the top.
Common.chatVisibility: Only visible to members of this pool
Common.chatEmpty: No messages yet. Say something first!

Home.heroTitle: Predict smarter than your friends, family or colleagues
Home.heroSubtitle: Predict the Hockey World Cup, and soon the Dutch Hoofdklasse or your own competition. Create a pool with friends, family or colleagues and compete for first place.
Home.step1Text: Start with the Hockey World Cup. One-time access, then create unlimited pools.
Home.step2Text: Predict scores, the winner, finalists and top scorer before the match starts.
Home.step3Text: After every match, points are automatically calculated using the pool's scoring system.
Home.step4Text: See live how you're doing — in your own pool and nationally.
Home.featuresTitle: Everything you need for a great pool
Home.featureLiveText: Points are recalculated instantly after every result.
Home.featureFlexibleText: Admins can fully customize the points system.
Home.featureMultiSportText: From the Hockey World Cup to the Hoofdklasse or your own friend group — upload your own competition.
Home.featureCompanyText: Pay once for your whole company, team, family or friend group — everyone else joins for free with their own leaderboard.
Home.footerTagline: One platform for predicting, every sport, every competition.
Home.aboutText: HockeyPoule is an idea from Oranje-Rood Dames 1, born from a love of the game and the wish to let everyone — teammates, family, colleagues and friends — join in predicting big tournaments. Part of the proceeds go straight to the Oranje-Rood Dames 1 team fund.
Home.aboutSponsorTitle: Sponsor us or support the team
Home.aboutSponsorText: Want to sponsor Oranje-Rood Dames 1, advertise, or support the team in another way? Email us — we'd love to hear from you.
Home.feedbackText: Questions or feedback? Email us at hockeypoule@gmail.com

Auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to view your pools
Auth.registerSubtitle: Create a free account to join in
Auth.name: Name
Auth.demoNotice: Demo mode: no real account is created. Log in with any email address.

Dashboard.title: My pools
Dashboard.subtitle: Manage your pools and view your predictions
Dashboard.noPools: You're not part of any pool yet.
Dashboard.noOwnPools: You don't have your own pool yet. Create one, or join with a code.
Dashboard.switchText: See how you're doing in one of your other pools.
Dashboard.startText: Get one-time access — your national pool is ready for you right away.
Dashboard.phaseOpenText: {round} is now set - fill in your predictions before these matches kick off.

Competitions.comingSoonText: This competition isn't open for predictions yet. Check back later.
Competitions.accessText: You join the whole World Cup. Within it you predict women and men separately, each with their own leaderboard plus a combined overall leaderboard. One-time access - after that, create unlimited pools for free.
Competitions.supportText: Be a supporter too — add an extra amount on top of your entry.
Competitions.supportNote: This concept was developed by Oranje-Rood Dames 1 - donate here to their team fund.
Competitions.companyOption: For friends, family, teammates or colleagues
Competitions.companyOptionText: Pay once for your company, club, team, family or group of friends. They join afterwards for free using a code.
Competitions.companyGroupName: Group name (company, club, team or family)
Competitions.companyGroupNamePlaceholder: E.g. Office Team, HC Oranje-Rood D1, The Smith Family
Competitions.companyResultText: Send this code to everyone you want to include — they enter it under Join with a code and play along completely free.
Competitions.redeemSeatText: Enter your company, club, team or family's code to join for free.
Competitions.createCustomText: Football, basketball, your own friend group or league — upload your teams and go.
Competitions.customUnavailableTitle: Creating your own competition isn't available right now
Competitions.customUnavailableText: We've temporarily switched this off. For now, join the 2026 Hockey World Cup — custom competitions will be back later.
Competitions.bulkDiscountNote: More than 15 people? Email us at hockeypoule@gmail.com for a group deal.
Competitions.csvFormatNote: One team name per line - or add teams manually below.
Competitions.csvError: Couldn't read the file. Put one team name per line.
Competitions.roundRobinQuestion: Does everyone play each other once or twice (home and away)?
Competitions.roundRobinOnceText: Every team plays every other team once.
Competitions.roundRobinTwiceText: Every team plays every other team twice.
Competitions.manualGroupAssignmentText: This is the draw as set by the organizer - adjust who's grouped with whom here.
Competitions.matchupsPreviewText: Uncheck a matchup if these two teams don't actually play each other.
Competitions.planningToggle: Fill in a date, time and location now
Competitions.planningToggleText: Used as the default for every match. Leave this off to fill it in later per match via the admin panel.
Competitions.customEntryFeeNote: Just like the Hockey World Cup, joining costs a one-time €4 - you'll be asked on the next page, right after creating it.

Pools.publicText: Anyone with the link can join
Pools.needsAccessText: You don't have access yet to this pool's competition.
Pools.predictForWhomNote: This pool only predicts this tournament — create a second pool if you want to play the other one too.
Pools.predictScope: Predict the whole tournament or just one country?
Pools.scopeFullText: Predict every match of this tournament.
Pools.scopeCountryText: Not up for the whole tournament? Pick one country and just predict their matches — less work, and you become king/queen of that country in this pool.

PoolDetail.notMemberYet: You are not a member of this pool yet.
PoolDetail.noAccessYet: You don't have access yet to this pool's competition.
PoolDetail.overallText: Anyone taking part in the official pool of both tournaments counts here combined.

Team.squadComingSoon: Coming soon — the full squad per team will appear here once known.

Predictions.title: My predictions
Predictions.subtitle: Enter all your predictions here. They automatically count for every pool you're in — you only ever predict a match once.
Predictions.noAccess: You don't have access to a competition to predict yet.

WkOverview.subtitle: All participating countries, pool draw and the current group-stage standings — for both the women's and men's tournament.
WkOverview.ctaTitle: Join in and predict the whole tournament
WkOverview.ctaText: One-time access, then unlimited free pools for yourself, family or colleagues.
